name: marigold-mcp

server.auth: OAuth 2.1 (DCR + PKCE) — connect via a client that supports it (claude.ai connector, Claude Code `claude mcp add`)

runVia: prompts/cold-start.md — kind:mcp targets cannot be pure-scripted; every tool call is wrapped in a model turn, so runs go through an agent following the prompt template.
notes: create_doc returns docId, slug, absolute url, versionId, ordinal in ONE call — live shareable URL immediately, no follow-up round trip.
update_doc mints a new immutable content-addressed versionId; identical HTML is a dedup no-op (response carries an 'unchanged' flag).
get_doc returns full currentHtml plus latestVersionId/publishedVersionId; note it returns a RELATIVE url while create/update return absolute (known inconsistency, see baseline friction_notes).

FEEDBACK phase: posting a comment has no MCP tool (comments come from humans in the viewer); the agent-side FEEDBACK measurement is get_comments. For a full post+read loop a human/browser must place the comment.
Timing caveat: phase walls bracket the MCP call PLUS model turns on both ends — upper bounds on product latency. See README 'model-turn bracketing'.
tool_load_ms (connector/tool-schema fetch at session start) is this target's analogue of DISCOVERY; record it separately.
